# eICU Hospital-Clustered Sensitivity

- Hospitals in pooled external evaluation: 205.
- Hospitals meeting per-site reporting threshold: 142 (>=100 patients and >=50 positive/negative windows).
- Hospital-clustered bootstrap replicates: 500.
- Frozen MIMIC model, calibration and thresholds; no eICU fitting.

## Clustered Confidence Intervals

metric,ci95_low,ci95_high
auroc,0.6126900847751898,0.632575202083817
auprc,0.08643447636078513,0.09778291499937336
brier,0.04351118974130951,0.04854828753868193
sensitivity_at_spec_90,0.35970188466712205,0.39738774489341305
specificity_at_spec_90,0.7720592861817964,0.805523288285643
sensitivity_at_spec_95,0.24789785416173243,0.27656697735772284
specificity_at_spec_95,0.8710341123165098,0.8915168401068475

ece,142,0.032718102024015316,0.0321717791236804,0.019829441032480813,0.04364497764805031,0.002975635461320341,0.08054703261801524
prevalence,142,0.04409556466312161,0.043831922113895416,0.03379171807318926,0.05549712851643562,0.0044703190214931965,0.08680442720651627


Subject-clustered external AUROC was 0.6221; hospital-clustered uncertainty is reported separately and does not replace the prespecified subject-clustered primary analysis.
